All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ActorsFactory
A pizzeria employees factory.
Baker
This is a baker, he works three days without a salary.
CommandLineArguments
A program command-line arguments storage.
ConsoleOrderLogger
An object that writes logs to the standard output.
Courier
A guy with a fairly promising job.
Order
A pizza order.
OrderingService
A service that generates orders and puts theme into the queue.
OrderLogger
An object that logs order statuses.
OrderQueue
A queue of pizza orders.
OrderReaper
An order collector.
OrderStatus
Describes different order statuses.
Pizza
A tasty cheesy pizza.
PizzaInMenu
Different pizza positions in menu.
PizzaWarehouse
A limited warehouse for holding pizza before delivery.
Pizzeria
A pizzeria simulation.
PizzeriaConfiguration
A configuration object that holds information about pizzeria.
Reapable
An orders owner that can release them.
